tagline: A clearer way to find property in Saudi Arabia

hero.title: Find a place that feels right
hero.subtitle: Explore clearly presented demo listings across Saudi regions, cities, and neighborhoods.
hero.search: Search by city, district, title or reference
hero.demo: All generated listings are clearly labeled as demo data.

search.title: Property search
search.subtitle: Refine results by location, type, price, area, and features.
search.noResultsHint: Try removing a filter, widening the price range, or searching a nearby location.
search.alternativesHint: No property satisfies every selected filter. The alternatives below are clearly broadened and are not exact matches.
search.sameDistrict: Similar properties in the same district
search.sameCity: More options in the same city
search.sameRegion: More options in the same region
search.expandedToCity: Location expanded from the selected district to its city.
search.expandedToRegion: Location expanded from the selected city to its region.
search.error: We could not load properties. Please try again.

property.name: Full name
property.failure: The enquiry could not be sent.
property.required: Enter your name and a valid Saudi phone number.

home.saleTitle: Properties for Sale in Saudi Arabia
home.saleHint: Explore homes, land, and commercial opportunities across the Kingdom.
home.rentTitle: Properties for Rent in Saudi Arabia
home.rentHint: Find flexible residential and commercial rentals in major Saudi cities.
home.featuredHint: A curated selection of standout demo listings.
home.popularHint: Start with the locations people search most often.
home.categoriesHint: Move directly to the kind of property you need.
home.whyHint: A focused property-search experience built for Saudi Arabia.
home.bilingualHint: Equal-quality Arabic RTL and English LTR experiences.
home.clearSearchHint: Filter by location, property details, price, area, and features.
home.transparentHint: Generated listings are clearly identified and never presented as genuine offers.
home.ctaHint: Filter by Saudi region, city, district, price, area, and amenities.
home.contactTitle: Need help finding the right property?
home.contactHint: Contact the business team once the verified telephone and WhatsApp details are configured.
home.empty: No published properties are available in this section yet.

footer.summary: A bilingual Saudi property discovery experience with transparent demo listings.
footer.disclaimer: Demo listings are fictional and are provided only to test the platform.
